title: pyrethrum acmella
intro: Pyrethrum acmella, also known as the parthenium or false feverfew, is a flowering plant native to South America, known for its unique ability to fold its leaves when touched. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which help to alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The medicinal properties of pyrethrum acmella are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and easing menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of pyrethrum acmella, such as teas and tinctures, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
